title: A spool
abstract: A spool (100, 200) for winding metal wire on, said spool (100, 200) comprising a tubular core (105, 205, D1) and a pair of flanges (110, 210), said flanges (110, 210) are fixed to either end of said tubular core (105, 205, D1), each of said flanges (110, 210) having an outer plane outwardly oriented to said tubular core (105, 205, D1), characterized in that, said tubular core (105, 205, D1) has two end portions (125, 225) extending out of said pair of flanges (110, 210), and each of said end portions (125, 225) has an outer end surface extending out of said outer plane of said flange (110, 210).
claims: Claims Claims 1 . A spool for winding metal wire on, said spool comprising a tubular core and a pair of flanges, said flanges are fixed to either end of said tubular core, each of said flanges having an outer plane outwardly oriented to said tubular core, characterized in that, said tubular core has two end portions extending out of said pair of flanges, and each of said end portions has an outer end surface extending out of said outer plane of said flange. 2. A spool as claimed in claim 1 , characterized in that, each of said end portions has an axial length being 0.01 -0.25 times of the axial length of said tubular core. 3. A spool as claimed in claim 2, characterized in that, each of said end portions has an axial length being 0.04-0.15 times of the axial length of said tubular core. 4. A spool as claimed in claim 1 , characterized in that, each of said end portions comprises at least one lifting hole, said lifting hole is penetrating at least part of the wall of said end portion of said tubular core. 5. A spool as claimed in claim 4, characterized in that, each of said end portions comprises two lifting holes. 6. A spool as claimed in claim 1 , characterized in that, said tubular core has an outer diameter D1 expressed in mm, each of said flanges has an outer diameter D2 expressed in mm, said D1 is in the range of (0.35-0.65)xD2. 7. A spool as claimed in claim 6, characterized in that, said D1 is in the range of (0.45-0.55)xD2. 8. A spool as claimed in claim 1 , characterized in that, each of said flanges comprises a round plate and an edge curl along the outer rim of said round plate, said round plate has a thickness being more than 3mm. 9. A spool as claimed in claim 8, characterized in that, said round plate has a thickness being in the range of 3.5mm - 6.5mm. 10. A spool as claimed in claim 1 , characterized in that, each of said flanges is a round plate, said round plate has a thickness being more than 3.5mm. 1 1 .A spool as claimed in claim 10, characterized in that, said round plate has a thickness being in the range of 4.0mm - 30.0mm. 12. A spool as claimed in claim 1 , characterized in that, said tubular core has a thickness of the wall being in the range of 6mm-40mm. 13. A spool as claimed in claim 1 , characterized in that, said tubular core is made of seamless steel tube. 14. A spool as claimed in claim 1 , characterized in that, said a pair of flanges are fixed on said tubular core by welding. 15. A spool as claimed in claim 1 , characterized in that, said tubular core comprises central bore hole extending from the outer end surface of said tubular core to the center of said tubular core along the central axis of said tubular core, said tubular core further comprises a support located in the middle of said tubular core, said support is for reinforcing said spool and for fixing said spool during use.
